requirement: Every local input is inventoried and hashed before use.
Eurostat 2025 coverage is checked by country and by required variable.
Debt, liquidity, income and trade state variables are built in visible notebook cells.
All horizons, lags and dependent variables used by local projections are created in the notebook.
The investment shock is constructed from visible residualization and Cholesky steps.
Lagged state variables and shock-by-state interactions are built before estimation.
The exact regressors, sample sizes, ranks and condition numbers are exported.
Coefficients, standard errors, p-values and profile ratios are computed in notebook cells.
Every regression has a coefficient vector, covariance block, profile-contrast row and ratio-arithmetic row.
Same-equation covariance blocks are checked for symmetry inside the notebook.
Direct debt-to-GDP kernels use the same visible estimation machinery.
Scenario paths and annual debt arithmetic are explicit year by year, including equal-weight annual rows for Appendix C.
Model selection is shown as pass/fail columns, not as an implicit choice.
Country-bootstrap uncertainty is re-estimated and propagated through debt endpoints.
Tables, figures and article numbers are mapped back to notebook outputs or source-ledger work.
Every estimation stage must point to visible notebook code, inputs, outputs and QA.
Long estimator cells must be split into smaller visible notebook blocks.
Execution must fail if the notebook delegates estimation to the old external estimator scripts.
